scripts.dev: npm run build && npm run dev -w examples/starter
scripts.dev:site: npm run build && npm run dev -w @gazetta/website
scripts.deploy:site: npm run build && cd sites/gazetta.studio/worker && npm run seed && npm run deploy
scripts.dev:admin: npm run build && npm run dev:api -w @gazetta/admin & npm run dev:ui -w @gazetta/admin
